questions.text: Which description best matches AWS Cloud value proposition in AWS Cloud Practitioner Domain 1.0 Cloud Concepts?

Global infrastructure benefits include deploying workloads closer to users, reaching global markets faster, and using AWS Regions and edge infrastructure to support performance and availability.

Global reach means AWS can help organizations serve users in many geographic areas by using AWS Regions, Availability Zones, and edge locations.

explanations.c: Speed of deployment means Speed of deployment means cloud resources can be provisioned quickly instead of waiting for traditional hardware purchasing and installation cycles. AWS Cloud value proposition is different because the scenario is asking for a specific AWS Cloud benefit such as speed, global reach, availability, elasticity, agility, or the overall cloud value proposition.
explanations.d: Global reach means Global reach means AWS can help organizations serve users in many geographic areas by using AWS Regions, Availability Zones, and edge locations.
